Good morning, Usina Cururique. This is Anna speaking.
Hello, this is Mr. Costa. Can I make a plan to visit next week?
Of course. I am free on Tuesday. I am going to send you an email with the time.
Perfect. And how is your sugar?
It is white, clean and very sweet. It is a natural product.
Excellent. I am going to call you on Tuesday. Thank you, Anna.

Hello, I am Anna. I work at Usina Cururique. Every morning, I read my email and I reply to my partners. Then I call our buyers on the phone. Sometimes they are busy, so I take a message. In the afternoon, I check my calendar and I make plans for next week. I also show our product to visitors. Our sugar is white, clean and natural. I love my job.

Hello, this is Mr. Costa. I am calling about your sugar. I want to make a plan for next week. Are you free on Tuesday? Please send me an email with the price. I need a sweet and natural product in strong bags. Thank you, and please call me back.

First, Anna reads the email from the buyer. Then she calls the buyer on the phone. Next, she checks her calendar and makes a plan. After that, she describes the product: white, clean and sweet. Finally, she sends a reply and confirms the meeting.
